comments:
// Kitchen-sink C# blueprint fixture. Exercises every major construct so
// design-principle changes to the C# transform surface as visible snapshot diffs.

comments.text: // try/catch/finally with when + using declaration + using statement
// tuples + deconstruction + target-typed new + collection expression
// checked statement + yield return (via iterator method below)

// fixed + unsafe handled in unsafe context (pointer omitted for clarity)
        // goto + labeled statement
// Tuple deconstruction with parenthesized variable designation.
// Attribute target specifier + global attribute target.
// LINQ join / let / group, as / is simple expressions.
// empty + continue + break statements in a loop.

// Checked expression / unchecked / fixed (unsafe) — exercise more
    // statement kinds.
// Simple is-expression (type test, no pattern binding).
// Scoped type (C# 11) and ref type in parameters.

// Var pattern + parenthesized pattern + parenthesized variable
    // designation (`(int x, int y) = pair`).

comments: // Iter 20: new shapes — statements, expressions, patterns, literals.
